definition: Measures trailing 60 trading day price strength adjusted for recent reversals
interpretation: Positive values indicate recent winners; higher ranks favor stocks with stronger intermediate-term trends
common_failure_modes: Crowded positioning, volatility spikes, regime breaks, and sharp reversals can hurt momentum.

definition: Measures recent realized volatility over approximately one trading month
interpretation: Lower volatility can indicate defensive or quality exposure; high values signal unstable price action
common_failure_modes: Volatility can remain elevated during crises and low-volatility baskets can lag in sharp recoveries.

definition: Measures average traded dollar volume as a liquidity proxy
interpretation: Higher values indicate deeper trading capacity and lower implementation risk
common_failure_modes: Volume spikes may reflect stress rather than healthy liquidity; small-cap shocks and widening spreads can weaken the signal.

definition: Measures sector ETF performance relative to a broad-market benchmark
interpretation: Positive values indicate sectors outperforming the broad market
common_failure_modes: Fast macro rotations, commodity shocks, and benchmark concentration can make sector leadership unstable.
